<a id="class-db-meter"></a>

# DB_Meter

**Inherits:** `PanelContainer`

Real-time dB meter for deck/microphone bus monitoring Reads bus peaks and drives shader-based meter fills

| `bool`           | [Use_Microphone_Input](#class-db-meter-property-use-microphone-input)       | `false`          |
